prompt: Save this to my vault. I took a photo of a whiteboard session from today's system design meeting. The image is at /tmp/whiteboard-2026-04-09.png. The session covered microservices architecture: we decided to split our monolith into three services — auth, payments, and notifications. Each service owns its own database. We'll use Kafka for async messaging between them.
